chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 723 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2818/2019 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case (Notice issued to advocate) (Duplicate set not supplied by petitioners’ counsel) 18.09.2019 None present since beginning. On the last date of hearing, position was same. Apparently, petitioners are no more interested. Now, it is 11:03 a.m. Dismissed on account of non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
